CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test_schema.test_table AS SELECT * FROM existing_table WHERE column1 > 100;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test_schema.empty_table AS SELECT * FROM another_table WHERE column2 < 50 WITH NO DATA;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test_schema.complex_table AS SELECT a.column1, b.column2 FROM table_a a JOIN table_b b ON a.id = b.a_id WHERE b.status = 'active' WITH DATA;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test_schema.nested_query_table AS SELECT * FROM (SELECT column1, AVG(column2) FROM data_table GROUP BY column1) AS avg_data WITH DATA;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test_schema.subquery_table AS SELECT user_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE orders.user_id = users.id) AS order_count FROM users WITH DATA;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test_schema.no_data_table AS SELECT * FROM yet_another_table WITH NO DATA;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test_schema.large_data_table AS SELECT * FROM large_table WHERE column3 BETWEEN 100 AND 200 WITH DATA;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test_schema.joined_table AS SELECT a.col1, b.col2 FROM table1 a LEFT JOIN table2 b ON a.id = b.foreign_id WHERE b.col3 IS NOT NULL WITH DATA;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test_schema.conditional_table AS SELECT * FROM conditional_source WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM another_table WHERE condition_column = conditional_source.condition_column) WITH DATA;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test_schema.union_table AS SELECT col1, col2 FROM table1 UNION SELECT col1, col2 FROM table2 WITH DATA;
